text:
The Shape Shiftress is a member of Miles Knightly's heist crew who appears in the episode "One Crew Over the Crewcoo's Morty".

The Shape Shiftress is first seen as apart of Miles Knightly’s crew in stealing the Crystal Skull of Horwitz. However, Rick reveals that he built a robot named Heistotron and hypnotizes her with the other crew members to give him and Morty the crystal instead.
